## What problem would this solve

What are you trying to do that the tool doesn't currently support?

## Proposed solution

What you'd imagine this looking like — doesn't need to be technical, a rough idea
is fine.

## Alternatives considered

Anything you've already tried or worked around.

## Additional context

Anything else worth knowing — links, screenshots, related issues.

---

This is a one-person hobby project (see the README) — there's no roadmap
commitment and no guaranteed timeline. Feature requests are welcome and read,
but may sit for a while before anything happens.


**Additional context**
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
